message:
test(plan): add proptest suite for mission lifecycle state machine correctness

13 tests (8 structural unit + 5 property-based) validating:
- Transition table determinism (no duplicate from+via pairs)
- Terminal states have no outgoing transitions
- All non-terminal states reachable from Planning via BFS
- Terminal states reachable from Planning
- apply_transition agrees with allowed_transitions
- Serde roundtrip for all state and transition-kind variants
- is_terminal consistent with terminal states list
- Invalid transitions leave mission state and timestamp unchanged
- Valid transitions update state and timestamp
- Random walk from Planning always stays in valid states
- Wrong target state always rejected by transition_lifecycle
- Display produces valid snake_case for all states

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
